title: The 2025 increase has a different recorded composition
caption: Annual UCDP organized-violence deaths by category, best estimates, 2010–2025. Between 2024 and 2025, the total rises by 57,255, while one-sided deaths rise by 62,026; state-based and non-state deaths both decline slightly.
alt_text: Stacked annual bars for state-based, non-state and one-sided violence from 2010 to 2025. The 2022 peak is mostly state-based. In 2025, the total increases by about 57,255 from 2024, while the one-sided component increases by about 62,026 and becomes much larger than in prior years.
source: UCDP Organized Violence v26.1; ConflictLens calculations.
measure: Annual UCDP Organized Violence deaths by state-based, non-state and one-sided category, best estimates
universe: Validated ConflictLens analysis-conflict universe; existing analysis units; global annual sums
filters: guarded zero-fill only where ucdp_ov_can_zero_fill == True
notes: Stacked bars encode a real composition. Stable order and hatches preserve interpretation in grayscale.
